prompt: Check in on my MUD character's stats and inventory, and update your notes on where things stand.

assertions.text: Actually connected to the live MUD server and logged in as 'dummy'
Ran 'score' (or equivalent) and read real stat output
Ran 'inventory'/'equipment' (or equivalent) and read real item output
Final reply to the user reports concrete stats (level, HP, gold, etc.) matching what the server returned, not placeholders
data/character.md was actually edited to reflect the fresh info (no longer all 'unknown')
Logged out with 'quit' before tearing down the connection
